reviews.comment: We had no hot water this morning our Bosch opti flow wasn't working at all. Called housework's plumbers and was so easy to book for same day service in Canning vale. Our plumber Tim even showed up before time which was great he did the inspection, made sure our issue was resolved. Also took the time to check our shower heads ans taps to ensure water is flowing well throughout the house with no blocks. Our plumber ran through future options for us when we asked and what's best suited for our home. Tim took the time to explain everything and also provide detailed quotes for new hot water system and installation (his recommendations made it easy for us to choose between Rheem instantaneous hot water unit or Rennai.) Highly recommend housework's plumbers fantastic to deal with, knowledgeable, clean, honest and timely.
reviews.reply: Thank you so much for your wonderful review, Reem! We truly appreciate you taking the time to share your experience in such detail. We're so pleased to hear that Tim was able to assist promptly and provide helpful advice.
